items.briefing:
The Australian Cyber Security Centre (ACSC) is warning that credentials for Fortinet firewall and VPN products may have been exposed. If your organisation uses Fortinet devices for remote access or network security, treat this as urgent — contact your IT team to check whether your systems are affected and consider changing administrative passwords as a precaution.

Separately, a compromise involving the Klue app has led to ongoing Salesforce data thefts — if your organisation uses Salesforce, confirm with your IT provider that your account has not been impacted. **Practical tip:** Check with IT today whether your organisation uses Fortinet or Salesforce, and report any unusual login alerts immediately.

featured.title: Mackay Sugar cyber attack flagged as broader risk to Australia’s food supply chain
featured.quote: Critical infrastructure attack on major Australian food exporter demonstrates supply chain vulnerability risk.
